name: Invoice Bill Extraction Assistant
description: Extracts invoice, bill, supplier, tax, total, line item, consumption, and approval-routing fields from local invoice PDFs with shared LLM OCR fallback.

document_folder.description: Local folder containing PDF electricity invoices with JSON labels.

output_folder.description: Local folder where review packets should be written.

field_profile.description: Field names or extraction profile for this workflow.

public_dataset.description: Public dataset selected as the sample input source.

example.name: IDSEM Dataset
example.provider: University of Las Palmas de Gran Canaria on Zenodo
example.license: Dataset record on Zenodo; review source terms before production use.
example.availability_note: Public Zenodo dataset with electricity bill PDFs and JSON labels; includes reduced preview subsets as described by the dataset record.
example.download_hint: Use the reduced preview first; the full idsem.zip is large.

contract.summary: AP, ERP, BPO, and utility billing teams need private extraction of supplier pricing, tax identifiers, customer data, bank details, and spending patterns from high-volume invoice and bill PDFs.
users: Enterprises, AP teams, BPOs, ERP vendors, and energy or utility billing processors.

human.reason: Human approval is required before any downstream release, filing, payment, legal, clinical, credit, or system-sync action.

rules.message: Human approval is required before extracted values are released to downstream systems or used for consequential decisions.

dataset_input.name: IDSEM Dataset
dataset_input.provider: University of Las Palmas de Gran Canaria on Zenodo
dataset_input.license: Dataset record on Zenodo; review source terms before production use.
dataset_input.availability_note: Public Zenodo dataset with electricity bill PDFs and JSON labels; includes reduced preview subsets as described by the dataset record.
dataset_input.download_hint: Use the reduced preview first; the full idsem.zip is large.

steps.label: Stage Invoice Inputs
steps.goal: Resolve the local invoice folder and public IDSEM sample input notes.

steps.label: Extract Invoice Text
steps.goal: Read embedded text and call shared llm_ocr_skill only for scanned or low-text invoice pages.

steps.label: Extract Payable Fields
steps.goal: Extract supplier, customer, tax, due-date, total, line-item, and consumption fields.

steps.label: Validate Invoice Packet
steps.goal: Compare extracted fields to labels when JSON references are available and flag approval blockers.

steps.label: Write Invoice Packet
steps.goal: Write a review-only payable extraction packet with source evidence and routing notes.

primary.role: Local invoice OCR and field extraction team that prepares source-grounded payable review packets.

metadata.name: Invoice Bill Extraction Assistant
metadata.description: Extracts invoice, bill, supplier, tax, total, line item, consumption, and approval-routing fields from local invoice PDFs with shared LLM OCR fallback.
metadata.agent_role: Local invoice OCR and field extraction team that prepares source-grounded payable review packets.
metadata.target_users: Enterprises, AP teams, BPOs, ERP vendors, and energy or utility billing processors.
metadata.customizable_for: Accounts payable, utility bill intake, ERP invoice routing, vendor onboarding, spend analytics, and BPO document queues.
metadata.problem: AP, ERP, BPO, and utility billing teams need private extraction of supplier pricing, tax identifiers, customer data, bank details, and spending patterns from high-volume invoice and bill PDFs.

input_contract.description: AP, ERP, BPO, and utility billing teams need private extraction of supplier pricing, tax identifiers, customer data, bank details, and spending patterns from high-volume invoice and bill PDFs.

required_inputs.name: document_folder
required_inputs.description: Local folder containing PDF electricity invoices with JSON labels.

required_inputs.name: output_folder
required_inputs.description: Local folder where review packets should be written.

required_inputs.name: field_profile
required_inputs.description: Structured field names or extraction profile for this document workflow.

optional_inputs.name: public_dataset
optional_inputs.description: Downloadable public dataset reference used for sample input selection.

optional_inputs.name: review_policy
optional_inputs.description: Human review and confidence thresholds for final packet release.

mock.description: Uses the public dataset note and bundled text fixture when no local documents are selected.

json.description: Inline JSON object supplied through config or runtime overrides.

file.description: JSON object loaded from a local file path.

local_folder.description: Local folder mounted through OtterDesk local input handling.

final_artifact.description: Review-only structured document automation packet with source evidence, confidence, next steps, and source references.

output_contract.stdout: JSON object with result, final_artifact, artifact paths, and run metadata when the runner is executed directly.

human_control.reason: Human approval is required before any downstream release, filing, payment, legal, clinical, credit, or system-sync action.

artifacts.description: Stable run-store files and domain-specific document automation outputs.

human.description: Human notices, approval requests, responses, timeouts, and applied decisions.

input_skills.description: Local filesystem intake plus shared llm_ocr_skill OCR through Docker Model Runner.

inputs.description: Resolved document folder, public dataset reference, and field extraction profile.

logs.description: Runtime stdout/stderr and redacted document automation logs.

outputs.description: Primary review packet and structured extraction results.

resources.description: Resource samples such as token, runtime, connector, and disk usage.

web_ui.description: Optional review dashboard for artifact inspection.

init_config_review.instruction: Ask the user to select a local folder containing PDF electricity invoices with JSON labels, confirm the output folder, and keep the public dataset terms visible before launch.

fields.label: Invoice folder
fields.description: Choose a local folder containing PDF electricity invoices with JSON labels.

fields.label: Output folder
fields.description: Choose where review files should be written.

fields.label: LLM OCR
fields.description: Use the shared local LightOnOCR Docker Model Runner path for scanned or low-text documents.

fields.label: LLM mode
fields.description: Use ollama for local model calls, fake only for deterministic tests.
